mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships (requester_id, receiver_id, status) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT friendship_id, requester_id, receiver_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND ( (requester_id = #{requesterId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (requester_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{requesterId}) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT friendship_id, requester_id, receiver_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( (requester_id = #{userA} AND receiver_id = #{userB}) OR (requester_id = #{userB} AND receiver_id = #{userA}) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT f.friendship_id AS friendshipId, CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{userId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END AS friendId, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, f.status FROM friendships f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{userId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND (f.requester_id = #{userId} OR f.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS friend_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, u.gender, u.birth_year FROM users u JOIN friendships f ON ( (f.requester_id = #{myUserId} AND f.receiver_id = u.user_id) OR (f.receiver_id = #{myUserId} AND f.requester_id = u.user_id) ) WHERE u.user_id = #{friendId} AND f.status = 'ACCEPTED'
SELECT music_id FROM user_fav_music WHERE user_id = #{friend_id}
